expectations.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
expectations.evidence: ls confirmed all 3 files in outputs/: offer.md (11512 bytes), offer.json (9691 bytes), conversion-copy.md (3733 bytes).

expectations.text: offer.md shows evidence skill ran Mode C interview — has surfaced specific pain/gain not in original prompt (vd portfolio building, FAANG interview, agency feedback gap, salary plateau)
expectations.evidence: Baseline (no skill) — offer.md Section 1 is labeled 'AVATAR KHÁCH HÀNG (Giả định hợp lý)' (literally 'reasonable assumptions'), not an interview. There is no Mode C interview structure (no 5 rounds, no surfacing process, no user-confirmation step). The pains/gains are model assumptions ('Bị stuck ở visual', 'AI sẽ thay thế', 'imposter syndrome'), not interview-surfaced specifics tied to evidence. Without the skill, the model fabricated an avatar instead of running a structured interview — exactly the failure mode the assertion is designed to catch.

expectations.text: Dream outcome cụ thể: includes specific seniority jump + timeframe + measurable signal (vd 'lên Senior Designer trong 6 tháng + portfolio đậu offer Senior 25M-35M+/tháng')
expectations.evidence: value_equation.dream_outcome.statement: 'Lên mid/senior + tăng lương ≥ 30% (target x2) trong 90 ngày'. Has seniority jump (mid/senior), timeframe (90 ngày), measurable signal (≥30%, target x2 lương). Less specific than with_skill but meets the assertion bar.

expectations.text: Bonuses appropriate for high-touch 1-on-1 coaching: Voxer/Telegram access, playbook, mastermind, recording library, NOT consumer course templates like '50 email templates'
expectations.evidence: Bonuses: B1 Portfolio Audit Toolkit (templates), B2 Mock Interview Pack (3 mock sessions + senior guest), B3 Salary Negotiation Playbook + 1-1 offer review, B4 Senior Designer Network Pass (Slack community + events), B5 AI-Proof Designer Module (4 workshops). Slack/Telegram support is in core. Pattern matches high-touch coaching with playbook + community + extra 1-1. No consumer email templates.

expectations.text: Guarantee suited for high-ticket coaching: service guarantee ('work until success'), conditional, or better-than-money-back. NOT 14-day simple refund.
expectations.evidence: Triple guarantee: G1 Performance ('coach miễn phí thêm 90 ngày đến khi đạt'), G2 Conditional 50% refund after 4 sessions (~30 ngày), G3 Show-Up guarantee. G1 is service-guarantee/work-until-success; G2 is conditional. Not a simple 14-day refund.

expectations.text: STANDARD price in 30-50M range as user specified. PREMIUM can extend to 60-90M. All charm numbers.
expectations.evidence: Tier 2 (Senior Track 90, target) = 39,900,000 VND — within user-stated 30-50M. Tier 3 (VIP) = 89,900,000 — within 60-90M. All end in 900 (charm style — last meaningful digit 9).

expectations.text: Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x
expectations.evidence: value_stack_total_vnd = 71,700,000 / sale_price_vnd 39,900,000 = 1.797x. Well below the 8-15x Hormozi sweet spot. This is the canonical failure mode of unskilled Hormozi attempts: bonus values are realistic but not stacked aggressively enough to hit the perceived-value multiple. The output even brags 'Tổng giá trị giao: ~109M' in offer.md but the offer.json value_stack_total only sums to 71.7M and the divide-by-list-price (79M / 39.9M) is still under 2x.

expectations.text: Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout.
expectations.evidence: Coach addresses the customer as 'em' (younger) and refers to self as 'anh/chị' — Vietnamese coaching convention. Examples: 'anh/chị sẽ coach miễn phí thêm 90 ngày cho đến khi em đạt được', 'em sẽ có 3-4 case study'. Vietnamese throughout, no 'bạn' usage.

expectations.text: Core offer has named unique mechanism (Magic Bean Story) — phương pháp X có Y bước, not generic '12 sessions coaching'
expectations.evidence: Core offer is named 'SENIOR TRACK 90' but has no named methodology with steps. The structure is a generic 12-week roadmap (Diagnostic → Case Study Foundation → UX Research → Design System → Portfolio Polish → LinkedIn → Mock Interview → Negotiation) — exactly the 'generic 12 sessions coaching' pattern the assertion warns against. There is no proprietary framework name like 'SHIP-UP', 'Magic Bean', 'X có Y bước'.

expectations.text: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses, guarantee, urgency, pricing, conversion_copy
expectations.evidence: offer.json parses as valid JSON but uses different top-level keys than required. Present: offer_meta, avatar (NOT 'anchor'), value_equation ✓, core_offer ✓, bonus_stack (NOT 'bonuses'), guarantees (NOT 'guarantee'), urgency_scarcity (NOT 'urgency'), pricing ✓, value_stack_summary, list_price_vnd, sale_price_vnd, cta, positioning_statement. Missing 'anchor', 'bonuses' (plural-singular mismatch in convention), 'guarantee' (singular), 'urgency' (renamed), and entirely missing 'conversion_copy' key. The conversion copy lives only in the separate .md file. Schema does not match contract — would break any downstream pipeline consuming offer.json.

expectations.text: Conversion copy uses language/pain points specifically resonating with junior designer (portfolio, feedback, career growth, design system), not generic 'kiếm tiền online'
expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md uses designer-specific terms: 'recruiter lướt portfolio 6 giây', 'case study senior với research thật + business metric', 'mock interview với senior PM + hiring manager', 'defend design với PM', 'MoMo, Tiki, VNG hiring manager', 'Senior-Level Gap Report'. No 'kiếm tiền online' or generic MMO language.

claims.claim: Stack value total = ~109M VND (per offer.md table) or 71.7M (per offer.json value_stack_total_vnd)
claims.evidence: offer.md final stack table says 'TỔNG GIÁ TRỊ THẬT ~71,700,000 VND' but tier 2 description above states 'Tổng giá trị giao: ~109,000,000 VND'. Internal contradiction — 109M is asserted nowhere as a calculated sum. Without skill, no consistent stack accounting.

Self-assigned score with no rubric. 'Score tự đánh giá: 8.5/10' is editorial, not derived. Hormozi's Value Equation does not produce a 0-10 score — it produces relative qualitative lifts. Misuse of framework.

claims.claim: 12 sessions × 60 min = '12 buổi coaching 1-1' worth 36,000,000 VND
claims.evidence: 36M / 12 buổi = 3M/buổi for a senior UX coach 8 năm exp is plausible for VN market (Topmate $100-200/session range). Internally consistent but contributes to the low stack ratio because bonuses are not aggressive enough.

claims.claim: Cohort limit = 4 students/quarter is true scarcity
claims.evidence: 1-1 coaching capacity constraint is genuine if coach is part-time. Plausible.

suggestions.reason: This is the most discriminating assertion in the eval — it cleanly separated skill from no-skill (skill ran 5-round interview; no-skill fabricated an avatar). Keep as-is. Could be strengthened by checking that the surfaced pains are NOT in the original prompt — i.e., a generation that just re-paraphrases prompt details would still get partial credit.

Without the skill, the model invented its own key names (avatar/bonus_stack/guarantees/urgency_scarcity) and omitted conversion_copy. The assertion correctly fails this, which is great. Worth tightening: also check that no extra renaming happens (e.g., reject if 'anchor' is renamed to 'avatar' even if 'avatar' is structurally similar).

Excellent discriminator — caught that without the skill, the model under-stacks (1.8x) because it picks realistic-feeling values without optimizing for the multiple. This is the assertion that most clearly proves the skill adds value.

Discriminating: skill produced SHIP-UP™ 5 bước; no-skill produced generic 12-week roadmap. Could be strengthened by requiring the mechanism name to be invoked in the conversion copy/headline — currently passes on a name buried in section 3 even if marketing copy doesn't lean on it.

No assertion checks for internal consistency between offer.md and offer.json — without_skill has a 71.7M vs 109M stack-value contradiction between the two files. A downstream pipeline consuming offer.json would see different numbers than the conversion copy. Worth adding a cross-file consistency assertion.

eval_feedback.overall: Eval is well-designed and clearly discriminating. The skill genuinely added value on 4 dimensions (Mode C interview structure, JSON schema contract, unique mechanism naming, stack value ratio). Pass rate 12/12 with skill vs 8/12 without is a meaningful signal.
